where.if: AND (CAST(p.id AS CHAR) = #{planNo} OR o.order_no LIKE concat('%',#{planNo},'%'))
AND p.member_id IN ( select userId from user_info where nickname LIKE concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or phone LIKE concat('%',#{keyword},'%') )

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pt_order_installment_plan p LEFT JOIN pt_private_order o ON o.id = p.order_id

SELECT p.id AS id, p.order_id AS orderId, o.order_no AS orderNo, p.member_id AS memberId, p.product_id AS productId, o.product_name AS productName, o.store_id AS storeId, p.total_amount AS totalAmount, p.down_payment_amount AS downPaymentAmount, p.paid_amount AS paidAmount, p.unpaid_amount AS unpaidAmount, p.installment_count AS installmentCount, p.current_period AS currentPeriod, p.status AS status, DATE_FORMAT(p.activated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS activatedAt, DATE_FORMAT(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, (select nickname from user_info where userId = p.member_id) AS memberName, (select phone from user_info where userId = p.member_id) AS memberMobile FROM pt_order_installment_plan p LEFT JOIN pt_private_order o ON o.id = p.order_id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT b.id AS id, b.plan_id AS planId, b.period_no AS periodNo, b.due_amount AS dueAmount, b.paid_amount AS paidAmount, DATE_FORMAT(b.due_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS dueDate, DATE_FORMAT(b.paid_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS paidTime, b.status AS status, b.pay_order_no AS payOrderNo FROM pt_order_installment_bill b WHERE b.plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY b.period_no ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) AS overdueCount, COALESCE(SUM(b.due_amount - b.paid_amount), 0) AS overdueAmount FROM pt_order_installment_bill b WHERE b.plan_id = #{planId} AND b.status = 2
